betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Cooling Towers and Condenser§f

§aComplete the steam cycle — condense exhaust steam back into water at every scale!§f

Cooling Towers and Condensers convert §bLow-Pressure Steam§f back into water, completing the Rankine cycle. They are essential for large-scale steam-based operations like the Catalytic Cracking Tower. Four tiers exist, ranging from a simple machine block to a massive hyperbolic tower.

§6Tier 1: Steam Condenser§f (Crafting Table):
§b• §e2×§f Steel Ingot
§b• §e4×§f Iron Plate
§b• §e1×§f Cast Copper Plate
§b• §e2,000 mB/s§f condensation rate.

§6Tier 2: Auxiliary Cooling Tower§f (Tier 3 Anvil):
§b• §e64×§f Concrete Bricks
§b• §e128×§f Iron Bars
§b• §e4×§f Steam Condenser
§b• §e20,000 mB/s§f condensation rate.

§6Tier 3: Cooling Tower§f (Tier 4 Anvil):
§b• §e128×§f Concrete
§b• §e32×§f Steel Scaffold
§b• §e16×§f Steam Condenser
§b• §e8×§f Steel Pipe
§b• §e200,000 mB/s§f condensation rate.

§6Tier 4: High-Power Steam Condenser§f (Assembly Machine):
§b• §e8×§f Welded Steel Plate
§b• §e4×§f Welded Cadmium Steel Plate
§b• §e16×§f Copper Plate
§b• §e3×§f Desh Motor
§b• §e24×§f Steel Pipe
§b• §e4×§f BDCL
§b• §e20,000,000 mB/s§f condensation rate (requires power!).

§eTip§f: Low-Pressure Steam condenses at a §e1:1§f ratio to water. Even a basic Steam Condenser (§e2,000 mB/s§f) is sufficient for a single cracking tower. Use Auxiliary Cooling Towers for medium-scale operations and full Cooling Towers for industrial-scale refining complexes!
